tools.name: code_execute_sandbox
tools.description:
Use this when you need to execute Python, JavaScript, or SQL code in a sandboxed environment and get the output. Supports Python (subprocess), JavaScript (eval), and SQL (in-memory SQLite).

1. output: stdout captured from code execution (max 10KB)
2. language: the language that was executed
3. exec

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "code_execute_sandbox" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.
